name: Spicy Harvest Pie
recipeIngredient: 15 oz pkg Pillsbury All-Ready pie crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Unroll the pie dough and place it in a 9-inch pie dish.
3. Press the edges of the dough together to seal the top.
4. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Let cool before serving.
